commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=30ec951b14c81b87c6ecda50d036222aa310ed88)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WebChat controller tail-signature dedup guard for same-run final, aborted, and stream-fallback assistant messages, plus controller tests, while preserving cross-run final appends.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +127. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence repro path on current main: set an active run whose chatMessages tail already contains the assistant reply, then deliver the same-run final payload with the same message; handleChatEvent appends it again.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch has a narrow repairable logic issue, but external real-behavior proof is still insufficient and must come from a contributor or maintainer environment before merge.

target.title: fix(ui): deduplicate assistant messages on chat.status final event
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
